response.step_by_step_log: The video features a song throughout. I identified the song from the on-screen text: "Pesawat Kertas 365 Hari". The performers in the video are virtual avatars Iofi and Moona. I performed a web search for '"Pesawat Kertas 365 Hari" JKT48 Indonesian and English lyrics' to find the lyrics. The song is in Indonesian.
response.global_summary: A cover of the song "Pesawat Kertas 365 Hari" performed by virtual YouTubers Iofi and Moona. The song plays throughout the video.

scenes.description: Two virtual characters perform the song "Pesawat Kertas 365 Hari" on a stage with a space-themed background. Metadata for the song appears in the bottom left corner.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Kutatap langit di pagi hari
Kuawali hari dengan doa
Semoga satu hari ini bisa
Dipenuhi oleh senyum
Walaupun terkadang hujan turun
Dan air mata juga mengalir
Di hari yang tak berjalan dengan mulus
Besok pun tetap semangat
Di dalam mimpiku selalu
Terlihat ada diriku sendiri
Yang dengan bebasnya melakukan semua
Hal yang ingin aku lakukan
Hiduplah bagai pesawat kertas
Terbang dan pergi, membawa impian
Sekuat tenaga dengan hembusan angin
Terus melaju terbang
Jangan bandingkan jarak terbangnya
Tapi bagaimana dan apa yang dilalui
Karena itulah satu hal yang penting
Selalu sesuai kata hati

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I look at the sky in the morning
I start the day with a prayer
Hopefully, this day can be filled with smiles
Even though sometimes it rains
And the tears also flow
On a day that doesn't go smoothly
Tomorrow, stay enthusiastic
In my dreams always
Visible, there is me alone
Who with freedom, do everything
Things that I want to do
Live like a paper airplane
Flying and leaving, carrying dreams
As strong as the energy with the wind blowing
Continue to race and fly
Don't compare the flight distance
But how and what is passed through
Because that is the one thing that is important
Always follow your heart

Continue to race and fly

Because that is the one thing that is important
Always follow your heart
When the stars are visible, stars or a night that is dark and black
At the time your spirit disappears, look for other people to talk to
Human is not created to be left alone
Sometimes we do not realize the good things around us
